---
applyTo: "**/*.py"
---

Ensure that all imports are grouped togther in the following order:

1. Standard library imports
2. Related third party imports
3. Local application/library specific imports

Ensure that all imports are sorted alphabetically within each group.
Ensure that there is a single blank line between each group of imports.
Ensure that there are not multiple import lines when a single line can be used.
